title: Project Scaffold & Handoff Files
description: Create directory structure, index.html skeleton, CSS file, JS modules, handoff files (feature_list.json, claude-progress.txt, init.sh)

title: BMI Calculator
description: Inputs: height (cm or ft/in), weight (kg or lbs). Unit toggle metric/imperial. Formula: weight(kg)/height(m)^2. Output: numeric BMI + WHO category.

title: US Navy Body Fat Calculator
description: Inputs: gender, waist, neck, height, hip (female). Male/Female formulas. Output: body fat % + ACE category.

title: Animated Gauge Charts
description: Pure SVG+CSS gauges, animated needle sweep, color-coded risk zones for BMI and body fat. Accessible with aria-label. Responsive 320px-1440px.

title: Input Validation & UX
description: Real-time validation, debounced auto-calc (300ms), smooth scroll to results, Reset button, localStorage for last inputs.

title: Combined Results Dashboard
description: BMI and Body Fat side-by-side, color-coded risk labels, health insight text, disclaimer.

title: Responsive Design
description: Mobile-first, breakpoints 320/768/1024/1440px, gauges stack on mobile, 44px tap targets.

title: SEO Meta Tags & Structured Data
description: Title, meta desc, OG tags, Twitter Card, JSON-LD (WebApplication, FAQPage, BreadcrumbList), canonical tag.

title: Sitemap & robots.txt
description: sitemap.xml with all pages, robots.txt allowing all crawlers.

title: PWA Manifest
description: manifest.json for Add to Home Screen, theme color, icons.

title: Educational Content & FAQ
description: What is BMI, Body Fat sections, BMI vs Body Fat comparison, US Navy Method explained, BMI limitations, FAQ (8+ questions) with details accordion.

title: Adsterra Ad Integration
description: Social Bar in head, banner 728x90 below hero, native banner between results and content, in-page push. Needs Adsterra account keys.

title: Google Sheets Webhook
description: Apps Script doPost function, frontend fire-and-forget fetch. Needs Apps Script deployment URL.

title: Visitor Counter
description: Today + Total counter in footer. sessionStorage deduplication. Graceful fallback using localStorage simulation (no external API dependency).

title: Feedback Form
description: Floating bottom-right widget, type + message fields, mailto fallback, toast notification.

title: Policy Pages
description: about.html, privacy.html, terms.html, contact.html — required for AdSense approval.

title: Share & Print Functionality
description: Twitter, Facebook, WhatsApp share buttons with pre-filled result text. Print Results button.

title: Performance Optimization
description: Inline critical CSS, defer non-critical, minify HTML/CSS/JS, Lighthouse audit targeting 95+ performance.

title: Vercel Deployment
description: Deploy via Vercel CLI, verify live site, update README with Vercel URL.
